species.pokedex_entry: It spits a liquid from its mouth to melt through Shelmet’s shell. Karrablast doesn’t eat the shell— it eats only the contents.

species.name: Kartana
species.pokedex_entry: Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives.

species.name: Kecleon
species.pokedex_entry: A Pokémon that has the ability to alter its body colors to match its surroundings. A Kecleon reverts to its original colors if it is startled.

species.name: Keldeo
species.pokedex_entry: They say that Keldeo must survive harsh battles and fully develop the horn on its forehead before this Pokémon’s true power will awaken.

species.name: Kilowattrel
species.pokedex_entry: It uses its throat sac to store electricity generated by its wings. There’s hardly any oil in its feathers, so it is a poor swimmer.

species.name: Kingambit
species.pokedex_entry: Though it commands a massive army in battle, it’s not skilled at devising complex strategies. It just uses brute strength to keep pushing.

species.name: Kingdra
species.pokedex_entry: It sleeps quietly, deep on the seafloor. When it comes up to the surface, it creates a huge whirlpool that can swallow even ships.

species.name: Kingler
species.pokedex_entry: It waves its huge, oversized claw in the air to communicate with others. But since the claw is so heavy, this Pokémon quickly tires.

species.name: Kirlia
species.pokedex_entry: A Kirlia has the psychic power to create a rip in the dimensions and see into the future. It is said to dance with pleasure on sunny mornings.

species.name: Klang
species.pokedex_entry: Spinning minigears are rotated at high speed and repeatedly fired away. It is dangerous if the gears don't return.

species.name: Klawf
species.pokedex_entry: This Pokémon lives on sheer cliffs. It sidesteps opponents’ attacks, then lunges for their weak spots with its claws.

species.name: Kleavor
species.pokedex_entry: A violent creature that fells towering trees with its crude axes and shields itself with hard stone. If one should chance upon this Pokémon in the wilds, one's only recourse is to flee.

species.name: Klefki
species.pokedex_entry: It never lets go of a key that it likes, so people give it the keys to vaults and safes as a way to prevent crime.

species.name: Klink
species.pokedex_entry: Interlocking two bodies and spinning around generates the energy they need to live.

species.name: Klinklang
species.pokedex_entry: The gear with the red core is rotated at high speed for a rapid energy charge.

species.name: Koffing
species.pokedex_entry: Getting up close to a Koffing will give you a chance to observe, through its thin skin, the toxic gases swirling inside. It blows up at the slightest stimulation.

species.name: Komala
species.pokedex_entry: It remains asleep from birth to death as a result of the sedative properties of the leaves that form its diet.

species.name: Kommo-o
species.pokedex_entry: Its rigid scales function as offense and defense. In the past, its scales were processed and used to make weapons and other commodities.

species.name: Koraidon
species.pokedex_entry: This Pokémon resembles Cyclizar, but it is far burlier and more ferocious. Nothing is known about its ecology or other features.

species.name: Krabby
species.pokedex_entry: Krabby live in holes dug into beaches. On sandy shores with little in the way of food, they can be seen squabbling with each other over territory.

species.name: Kricketot
species.pokedex_entry: When the trees take on new hues, more of these Pokémon appear. The tone they create by striking their antennae together resembles that of the marimba, an instrument of foreign lands.

species.name: Kricketune
species.pokedex_entry: It uses its cutlass-like arms to produce sound, the melody of which varies from individual to individual. It is a worthwhile endeavor to seek out one's favorite tunes.

species.name: Krokorok
species.pokedex_entry: The special membrane covering its eyes can sense the heat of objects, so it can see its surroundings, even in darkness.

species.name: Krookodile
species.pokedex_entry: It can expand the focus of its eyes, enabling it to see objects in the far distance as if it were using binoculars.

species.name: Kubfu
species.pokedex_entry: If Kubfu pulls the long white hair on its head, its fighting spirit heightens and power wells up from the depths of its belly.

species.name: Kyogre
species.pokedex_entry: Kyogre has appeared in mythology as the creator of the sea. After long years of feuding with Groudon, it took to sleep at the bottom of the sea.

species.name: Kyurem
species.pokedex_entry: It generates a powerful, freezing energy inside itself, but its body became frozen when the energy leaked out.

species.name: Lairon
species.pokedex_entry: When two Lairon meet in the wild, they fight for territory by bashing into each other with their steel bodies. The sound of their collision carries for miles.

species.name: Lampent
species.pokedex_entry: It arrives near the moment of death and steals spirit from the body.

species.name: Landorus
species.pokedex_entry: When the incarnations of wind and of lightning clash, Landorus arrives to quell the conflict. After the tempests and thunderbolts abate, the land is sure to be blessed with bountiful harvests.

species.name: Lanturn
species.pokedex_entry: The light-emitting orbs on its back are very bright. They are formed from a part of its dorsal fin. This Pokémon illuminates the inky darkness of deep seas.

species.name: Lapras
species.pokedex_entry: People have driven Lapras almost to the point of extinction. In the evenings, it is said to sing plaintively as it seeks what few others of its kind still remain.

species.name: Larvesta
species.pokedex_entry: The base of volcanoes is where they make their homes. They shoot fire from their five horns to repel attacking enemies.

species.name: Larvitar
species.pokedex_entry: A Larvitar is born deep under the ground. It must eat its way through the soil above and reach the surface for it to see its parents' faces.

species.name: Latias
species.pokedex_entry: They make a small herd of only several members. They rarely make contact with people or other Pokémon. They disappear if they sense enemies.

species.name: Latios
species.pokedex_entry: Even in hiding, it can detect the locations of others and sense their emotions since it has telepathy. Its intelligence allows it to understand human languages.

species.name: Leafeon
species.pokedex_entry: Just like a plant, it uses photosynthesis. As a result, it is always enveloped in clear air.

species.name: Leavanny
species.pokedex_entry: It keeps its eggs warm with heat from fermenting leaves. It also uses leaves to make warm wrappings for Sewaddle.

species.name: Lechonk
species.pokedex_entry: This Pokémon spurns all but the finest of foods. Its body gives off an herblike scent that bug Pokémon detest.

species.name: Ledian
species.pokedex_entry: It is said that in lands with clean air, where the stars fill the sky, there live many Ledian. For good reason, they use the light of the stars as energy.

species.name: Ledyba
species.pokedex_entry: Ledyba communicate using a fluid that they secrete from where the legs join the body. They are said to convey feelings to others by altering the fluid's scent.

species.name: Lickilicky
species.pokedex_entry: It wraps things with its extensible tongue. Getting too close to it will leave you soaked with drool.

species.name: Lickitung
species.pokedex_entry: Whenever it sees something unfamiliar, it always licks the object because it memorizes things by texture and taste. It is somewhat put off by sour things.

species.name: Liepard
species.pokedex_entry: This stealthy Pokémon sneaks up behind prey without making any sound at all. It competes with Thievul for territory.

species.name: Lileep
species.pokedex_entry: It disguises itself as seaweed by making its tentacles sway. Unsuspecting prey that come too close are swallowed whole. It became extinct 100 million years ago.

species.name: Lilligant
species.pokedex_entry: I suspect that its well-developed legs are the result of a life spent on mountains covered in deep snow. The scent it exudes from its flower crown heartens those in proximity.

species.name: Lillipup
species.pokedex_entry: This Pokémon is far brighter than the average child, and Lillipup won’t forget the love it receives or any abuse it suffers.

species.name: Linoone
species.pokedex_entry: It uses its explosive speed and razor-sharp claws to bring down prey. Running along winding paths is not its strong suit.

species.name: Litleo
species.pokedex_entry: This hot-blooded Pokémon is filled with curiosity. When it gets angry or starts fighting, its short mane gets hot.

species.name: Litten
species.pokedex_entry: Trying to pet Litten before it trusts you will result in a nasty scratch from its sharp claws. Be careful.

species.name: Litwick
species.pokedex_entry: While shining a light and pretending to be a guide, it leeches off the life force of any who follow it.

species.name: Lokix
species.pokedex_entry: It uses its normally folded third set of legs when in Showdown Mode. This places a huge burden on its body, so it can’t stay in this mode for long.

species.name: Lombre
species.pokedex_entry: In the evening, it takes great delight in popping out of rivers and startling people. It feeds on aquatic moss that grows on rocks in the riverbed.

species.name: Lopunny
species.pokedex_entry: An extremely cautious Pokémon. It cloaks its body with its fluffy ear fur when it senses danger.

species.name: Lotad
species.pokedex_entry: This Pokémon lives in ponds with clean water. It is known to ferry small Pokémon across ponds by carrying them on the broad leaf on its head.

species.name: Loudred
species.pokedex_entry: The force of this Pokémon’s loud voice isn’t just the sound—it’s also the wave of air pressure that blows opponents away and damages them.

species.name: Lucario
species.pokedex_entry: It has the ability to sense the auras of all things. It understands human speech.

species.name: Ludicolo
species.pokedex_entry: When it hears festive music, all the cells in its body become stimulated, and it begins moving in rhythm. It does not quail even when it faces a tough opponent.

species.name: Lugia
species.pokedex_entry: Lugia is so powerful even a light fluttering of its wings can blow apart houses. As a result, it chooses to live out of sight deep under the sea.

species.name: Lumineon
species.pokedex_entry: Uses its gleaming fins to hunt its prey. The view of Lumineon schooling near the surface of the sea at night is breathtaking— it's as though there were shining stars right there.

species.name: Lunala
species.pokedex_entry: It steals the light from its surroundings and then becomes the full moon, showering its own light across the night sky.

species.name: Lunatone
species.pokedex_entry: It was discovered at the site of a meteor strike 40 years ago. Its stare can lull its foes to sleep.

species.name: Lurantis
species.pokedex_entry: It requires a lot of effort to maintain Lurantis's vivid coloring, but some collectors enjoy this work and treat it as their hobby.

species.name: Luvdisc
species.pokedex_entry: Luvdisc make the branches of Corsola their nests. There is a custom from long ago of giving a Luvdisc as a gift to express one's feelings of love.

species.name: Luxio
species.pokedex_entry: Its claws loose electricity with enough amperage to cause fainting. They live in small groups.

species.name: Luxray
species.pokedex_entry: It has eyes that can see through anything. It spots and captures prey hiding behind objects.

species.name: Lycanroc
species.pokedex_entry: Its quick movements confuse its enemies. Well equipped with claws and fangs, it also uses the sharp rocks in its mane as weapons.

species.name: Lycanroc
species.pokedex_entry: It goads its enemies into attacking, withstands the hits, and in return, delivers a headbutt, crushing their bones with its rocky mane.

species.name: Mabosstiff
species.pokedex_entry: Mabosstiff loves playing with children. Though usually gentle, it takes on an intimidating look when protecting its family.

species.name: Machamp
species.pokedex_entry: It is impossible to defend against punches and chops doled out by its four arms. Its fighting spirit flares up when it faces a tough opponent.

species.name: Machoke
species.pokedex_entry: A belt is worn by a Machoke to keep its overwhelming power under control. Because it is so dangerous, no one has ever removed the belt.

species.name: Machop
species.pokedex_entry: It continually undertakes strenuous training to master all forms of martial arts. Its strength lets it easily hoist a sumo wrestler onto its shoulders.

species.name: Magby
species.pokedex_entry: If a Magby is spouting yellow flames from its mouth, it is in good health. When it is fatigued, black smoke will be mixed in with the flames.

species.name: Magcargo
species.pokedex_entry: The shell on its back is made of hardened magma. Tens of thousands of years spent living in volcanic craters have turned Magcargo's bodies into magma.

species.name: Magearna
species.pokedex_entry: Built roughly 500 years ago by a scientist, the part called the Soul-Heart is the actual life-form.

species.name: Magikarp
species.pokedex_entry: Its swimming muscles are weak, so it is easily washed away by currents. In places where water pools, you can see many Magikarp deposited there by the flow.

species.name: Magmar
species.pokedex_entry: In battle, it blows out intense flames from all over its body to intimidate its foe. These fiery bursts create heat waves that ignite grass and trees in the area.

species.name: Magmortar
species.pokedex_entry: It blasts fireballs of over 3,600 degrees F from the ends of its arms. It lives in volcanic craters.

species.name: Magnemite
species.pokedex_entry: The units at its sides are extremely powerful magnets. They generate enough magnetism to draw in iron objects from over 300 feet away.

species.name: Magneton
species.pokedex_entry: It is actually three Magnemite linked by magnetism. It generates powerful radio waves that raise temperatures by 3.6 degrees F within a 3,300-foot radius.

species.name: Magnezone
species.pokedex_entry: It evolved from exposure to a special magnetic field. Three units generate magnetism.

species.name: Makuhita
species.pokedex_entry: There’s a rumor of a traditional recipe for stew that Trainers can use to raise strong Makuhita.

species.name: Malamar
species.pokedex_entry: It’s said that Malamar’s hypnotic powers played a role in certain history-changing events.

species.name: Mamoswine
species.pokedex_entry: Its impressive tusks are made of ice. The population thinned when it turned warm after the ice age.

species.name: Manaphy
species.pokedex_entry: Rumored to migrate across the oceans and visit Hisui's coastal waters only rarely. Although Manaphy resembles Phione, it is also quite different. The relation between the two is unclear.

species.name: Mandibuzz
species.pokedex_entry: They adorn themselves with bones. There seem to be fashion trends among them, as different bones come into and fall out of popularity.

species.name: Manectric
species.pokedex_entry: It rarely appears before people. It is said to nest where lightning has fallen.

species.name: Mankey
species.pokedex_entry: When it starts shaking and its nasal breathing turns rough, it's a sure sign of anger. However, since this happens instantly, there is no time to flee.

species.name: Mantine
species.pokedex_entry: On sunny days, schools of Mantine can be seen elegantly leaping over the waves. It is not bothered by the Remoraid that hitches rides.

species.name: Mantyke
species.pokedex_entry: A friendly Pokémon that captures the subtle flows of seawater using its two antennae.

species.name: Maractus
species.pokedex_entry: Once each year, this Pokémon scatters its seeds. They’re jam-packed with nutrients, making them a precious food source out in the desert.

species.name: Mareanie
species.pokedex_entry: It plunges the poison spike on its head into its prey. When the prey has weakened, Mareanie deals the finishing blow with its 10 tentacles.

species.name: Mareep
species.pokedex_entry: Its fluffy wool rubs together and builds a static charge. The more energy is charged, the more brightly the lightbulb at the tip of its tail glows.

species.name: Marill
species.pokedex_entry: Its body is covered with water-repellent fur. Because of the fur, it can swim through water at high speed without being slowed by the water's resistance.

species.name: Marowak
species.pokedex_entry: A Marowak is the evolved form of a Cubone that has grown tough by overcoming the grief of losing its mother. Its tempered and hardened spirit is not easily broken.

species.name: Marshadow
species.pokedex_entry: This Pokémon can conceal itself in any shadow, so it went undiscovered for a long time.

species.name: Marshtomp
species.pokedex_entry: Its toughened hind legs enable it to stand upright. Because it weakens if its skin dries out, it replenishes fluids by playing in mud.

species.name: Maschiff
species.pokedex_entry: Its well-developed jaw and fangs are strong enough to crunch through boulders, and its thick fat makes for an excellent defense.

species.name: Masquerain
species.pokedex_entry: Its thin, winglike antennae are highly absorbent. It waits out rainy days in tree hollows.

species.name: Maushold
species.pokedex_entry: The larger pair protects the little ones during battles. When facing strong opponents, the whole group will join the fight.

species.name: Mawile
species.pokedex_entry: Its giant jaws are actually steel horns that transformed. It fools foes into complacency with its adorable gestures, then chomps them with its huge jaws.

species.name: Medicham
species.pokedex_entry: Through the power of meditation, Medicham developed its sixth sense. It gained the ability to use psychokinetic powers. This Pokémon is known to meditate for a whole month without eating.

species.name: Meditite
species.pokedex_entry: Meditite heightens its inner energy through meditation. It survives on just one berry a day. Minimal eating is another aspect of this Pokémon’s training.

species.name: Meganium
species.pokedex_entry: The fragrance of a Meganium's flower soothes and calms emotions. In battle, it gives off more of its becalming scent to blunt the foe's fighting spirit.

species.name: Melmetal
species.pokedex_entry: Centrifugal force is behind the punches of Melmetal’s heavy hex-nut arms. Melmetal is said to deliver the strongest punches of all Pokémon.

species.name: Meloetta
species.pokedex_entry: Many famous songs have been inspired by the melodies that Meloetta plays.

species.name: Meloetta
species.pokedex_entry: Many famous songs have been inspired by the melodies that Meloetta plays.

species.name: Meltan
species.pokedex_entry: They live as a group, but when the time comes, one strong Meltan will absorb all the others and evolve.

species.name: Meowscarada
species.pokedex_entry: With skillful misdirection, it rigs foes with pollen-packed flower bombs. Meowscarada sets off the bombs before its foes realize what’s going on.

species.name: Meowstic
species.pokedex_entry: The defensive instinct of the males is strong. It’s when they’re protecting themselves or their partners that they unleash their full power.

species.name: Meowth
species.pokedex_entry: Meowth withdraw their sharp claws into their paws to silently sneak about. For some reason, this Pokémon loves shiny coins that glitter with light.

species.name: Mesprit
species.pokedex_entry: Known as the Being of Emotion. In legend, this Pokémon was feared, as any who showed disrespect would have their emotions thrown into disarray.

species.name: Metagross
species.pokedex_entry: Metagross has four brains that are joined by a complex neural network. As a result of integration, this Pokémon is smarter than a supercomputer.

species.name: Metang
species.pokedex_entry: The claws tipping its arms pack the destructive power to tear through thick iron sheets as if they were silk. It flies at over 60 miles per hour.

species.name: Metapod
species.pokedex_entry: Its shell is as hard as an iron slab. A Metapod does not move very much because it is preparing its soft innards for evolution inside the shell.

species.name: Mew
species.pokedex_entry: A Mew is said to possess the genes of all Pokémon. It is capable of making itself invisible at will, so it entirely avoids notice even if it approaches people.

species.name: Mewtwo
species.pokedex_entry: A Pokémon that was created by genetic manipulation. However, even though the scientific power of humans made its body, they failed to give it a warm heart.

species.name: Mienfoo
species.pokedex_entry: Though small, Mienfoo’s temperament is fierce. Any creature that approaches Mienfoo carelessly will be greeted with a flurry of graceful attacks.

species.name: Mienshao
species.pokedex_entry: Delivered at blinding speeds, kicks from this Pokémon can shatter massive boulders into tiny pieces.

species.name: Mightyena
species.pokedex_entry: Mightyena travel and act as a pack in the wild. The memory of its life in the wild compels the Pokémon to obey only those Trainers that it recognizes to possess superior skill.

species.name: Milcery
species.pokedex_entry: They say that any patisserie visited by Milcery is guaranteed success and good fortune.

species.name: Milotic
species.pokedex_entry: It is said to live at the bottom of large lakes. Considered to be the most beautiful of all Pokémon, it has been depicted in paintings and statues.

species.name: Miltank
species.pokedex_entry: It gives over five gallons of milk daily. Its sweet milk is enjoyed by children and grown-ups alike. People who can't drink milk turn it into yogurt and eat it instead.

species.name: Mime Jr.
species.pokedex_entry: It habitually mimics foes. Once mimicked, the foe cannot take its eyes off this Pokémon.

species.name: Mimikyu
species.pokedex_entry: Its actual appearance is unknown. When a scholar saw what was under its rag, it was overwhelmed by terror and died.

species.name: Minccino
species.pokedex_entry: They pet each other with their tails as a form of greeting. Of the two, the one whose tail is fluffier is a bit more boastful.

species.name: Minior
species.pokedex_entry: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.

species.name: Minior
species.pokedex_entry: Originally making its home in the ozone layer, it hurtles to the ground when the shell enclosing its body grows too heavy.

species.name: Minun
species.pokedex_entry: Minun loves to cheer on its partner in battle. It gives off sparks from its body while it is doing so. If its partner is in trouble, this Pokémon gives off increasing amounts of sparks.

species.name: Miraidon
species.pokedex_entry: This seems to be the Iron Serpent mentioned in an old book. The Iron Serpent is said to have turned the land to ash with its lightning.

species.name: Misdreavus
species.pokedex_entry: A Misdreavus frightens people with a creepy, sobbing cry. It apparently uses its red spheres to absorb the fear of foes as its nutrition.

species.name: Mismagius
species.pokedex_entry: Its cries sound like incantations. Those hearing it are tormented by headaches and hallucinations.

species.name: Moltres
species.pokedex_entry: Moltres is a legendary bird Pokémon that can control fire. If injured, it is said to dip its body in the molten magma of a volcano to burn and heal itself.

species.name: Monferno
species.pokedex_entry: To intimidate attackers, it stretches the fire on its tail to make itself appear bigger.

species.name: Morelull
species.pokedex_entry: Morelull live in forests that stay dark even during the day. They scatter flickering spores that put enemies to sleep.

species.name: Morgrem
species.pokedex_entry: With sly cunning, it tries to lure people into the woods. Some believe it to have the power to make crops grow.

species.name: Morpeko
species.pokedex_entry: It carries electrically roasted seeds with it as if they’re precious treasures. No matter how much it eats, it always gets hungry again in short order.

species.name: Mothim
species.pokedex_entry: Scatters steel-colored scales as it flaps its wings. Despite being observed feeding primarily on the nectar of flowers, Mothim is not often seen around flower gardens.

species.name: Mr. Mime
species.pokedex_entry: A Mr. Mime is a master of pantomime. It can convince others that something unseeable actually exists. Once believed, the imaginary object does become real.

species.name: Mr. Rime
species.pokedex_entry: Its amusing movements make it very popular. It releases its psychic power from the pattern on its belly.

species.name: Mudbray
species.pokedex_entry: It eats dirt to create mud and smears this mud all over its feet, giving them the grip needed to walk on rough terrain without slipping.

species.name: Mudkip
species.pokedex_entry: On land, it can powerfully lift large boulders by planting its four feet and heaving. It sleeps by burying itself in soil at the water's edge.

species.name: Mudsdale
species.pokedex_entry: Mudsdale has so much stamina that it could carry over 10 tons across the Galar region without rest or sleep.

species.name: Muk
species.pokedex_entry: It prefers warm and humid habitats. In the summertime, the toxic substances in its body intensify, making Muk reek like putrid kitchen garbage.

species.name: Munchlax
species.pokedex_entry: It wolfs down its weight in food once a day, swallowing food whole with almost no chewing.

species.name: Munkidori
species.pokedex_entry: Munkidori keeps itself somewhere safe while it toys with its foes, using psychokinesis to induce intense dizziness.

species.name: Munna
species.pokedex_entry: It eats dreams and releases mist. The mist is pink when it’s eating a good dream, and black when it’s eating a nightmare.

species.name: Murkrow
species.pokedex_entry: Murkrow were feared as the alleged bearers of ill fortune. It shows strong interest in anything that sparkles. It will even try to steal rings from women.

species.name: Musharna
species.pokedex_entry: It drowses and dreams all the time. It’s best to leave it be if it’s just woken up, as it’s a terrible grump when freshly roused from sleep.

species.name: Nacli
species.pokedex_entry: The ground scrapes its body as it travels, causing it to leave salt behind. Salt is constantly being created and replenished inside Nacli’s body.

species.name: Naclstack
species.pokedex_entry: It compresses rock salt inside its body and shoots out hardened salt pellets with enough force to perforate an iron sheet.

species.name: Naganadel
species.pokedex_entry: One kind of Ultra Beast, it fires a glowing, venomous liquid from its needles. This liquid is also immensely adhesive.

species.name: Natu
species.pokedex_entry: It runs up short trees that grow on the savanna to peck at new shoots. A Natu's eyes look as if they are always observing something.

species.name: Necrozma
species.pokedex_entry: Light is apparently the source of its energy. It has an extraordinarily vicious disposition and is constantly firing off laser beams.

species.name: Necrozma
species.pokedex_entry: The light pouring out from all over its body affects living things and nature, impacting them in various ways.

species.name: Nickit
species.pokedex_entry: Cunning and cautious, this Pokémon survives by stealing food from others. It erases its tracks with swipes of its tail as it makes off with its plunder.

species.name: Nidoking
species.pokedex_entry: A Nidoking's thick tail packs enormously destructive power capable of toppling a metal transmission tower. Once it goes on a rampage, there is no stopping it.

species.name: Nidoqueen
species.pokedex_entry: It is adept at sending foes flying with harsh tackles using its tough, scaly body. This Pokémon is at its strongest when it is defending its young.

species.name: Nidoran
species.pokedex_entry: Its highly toxic barbs are thought to have developed as protection for this small-bodied Pokémon. When enraged, it releases a horrible toxin from its horn.

species.name: Nidoran
species.pokedex_entry: The male Nidoran has developed muscles that freely move its ears in any direction. Even the slightest sound does not escape this Pokémon's notice.

species.name: Nidorina
species.pokedex_entry: When it is with its friends or family, its barbs are tucked away to prevent injury. It appears to become nervous if separated from the others.

species.name: Nidorino
species.pokedex_entry: Its horn is harder than a diamond. If it senses a hostile presence, all the barbs on its back bristle up at once, and it challenges the foe with all its might.

species.name: Nihilego
species.pokedex_entry: It appeared in this world from an Ultra Wormhole. Nihilego appears to be a parasite that lives by feeding on people and Pokémon.

species.name: Nincada
species.pokedex_entry: It makes its nest at the roots of a mighty tree. Using its whiskerlike antennae, it probes its surroundings in the pitch-black darkness of soil.

species.name: Ninetales
species.pokedex_entry: It has long been said that each of the nine tails embody an enchanted power. A long-lived Ninetales will have fur that shines like gold.

species.name: Ninjask
species.pokedex_entry: Because it darts about vigorously at high speed, it is very difficult to see. Hearing its distinctive cries for too long induces a headache.

species.name: Noctowl
species.pokedex_entry: It unfailingly catches prey in darkness. Noctowl owe their success to superior vision that allows them to see in minimal light, and to their supple and silent wings.

species.name: Noibat
species.pokedex_entry: Even a robust wrestler will become dizzy and unable to stand when exposed to its 200,000-hertz ultrasonic waves.

species.name: Noivern
species.pokedex_entry: They fly around on moonless nights and attack careless prey. Nothing can beat them in a battle in the dark.

species.name: Nosepass
species.pokedex_entry: Its body emits a powerful magnetism. It feeds on prey that is pulled in by the force. Its magnetism is stronger in cold seasons.

species.name: Numel
species.pokedex_entry: Numel stores magma of almost 2,200 degrees Fahrenheit within its body. If it gets wet, the magma cools and hardens. In that event, the Pokémon’s body grows heavy and its movements become sluggish.

species.name: Nuzleaf
species.pokedex_entry: They live in holes bored in large trees. The sound of Nuzleaf’s grass flute fills listeners with dread.

species.name: Nymble
species.pokedex_entry: It’s highly skilled at a fighting style in which it uses its jumping capabilities to dodge incoming attacks while also dealing damage to opponents.

species.name: Obstagoon
species.pokedex_entry: It evolved after experiencing numerous fights. While crossing its arms, it lets out a shout that would make any opponent flinch.

species.name: Octillery
species.pokedex_entry: It ensnares its foe with its suction- cupped tentacles before delivering the finishing blow. If the foe turns out to be too strong, it spews ink to escape.

species.name: Oddish
species.pokedex_entry: This Pokémon grows by absorbing moonlight. During the daytime, it buries itself in the ground, leaving only its leaves exposed to avoid detection by its enemies.

species.name: Ogerpon
species.pokedex_entry: This mischief-loving Pokémon is full of curiosity. It battles by drawing out the type-based energy contained within its masks.

species.name: Oinkologne
species.pokedex_entry: It entrances female Pokémon with the sweet, alluring scent that wafts from all over its body.

species.name: Okidogi
species.pokedex_entry: Okidogi is a ruffian with a short temper. It can pulverize anything by swinging around the chain on its neck.

species.name: Omanyte
species.pokedex_entry: One of the ancient and long-since-extinct Pokémon that have been regenerated from fossils by humans. If attacked, it withdraws into its hard shell.

species.name: Omastar
species.pokedex_entry: An Omastar uses its tentacles to capture its prey. It is believed to have become extinct because its shell grew too large, making its movements slow and ponderous.

species.name: Onix
species.pokedex_entry: There is a magnet in its brain that prevents an Onix from losing direction while tunneling. As it grows older, its body becomes steadily rounder and smoother.

species.name: Oranguru
species.pokedex_entry: It knows the forest inside and out. If it comes across a wounded Pokémon, Oranguru will gather medicinal herbs to treat it.

species.name: Orbeetle
species.pokedex_entry: It emits psychic energy to observe and study what’s around it—and what’s around it can include things over six miles away.

species.name: Oricorio
species.pokedex_entry: It beats its wings together to create fire. As it moves in the steps of its beautiful dance, it bathes opponents in intense flames.

species.name: Oricorio
species.pokedex_entry: It creates an electric charge by rubbing its feathers together. It dances over to its enemies and delivers shocking electrical punches.

species.name: Oricorio
species.pokedex_entry: This Oricorio relaxes by swaying gently. This increases its psychic energy, which it then fires at its enemies.

species.name: Oricorio
species.pokedex_entry: It summons the dead with its dreamy dancing. From their malice, it draws power with which to curse its enemies.

species.name: Orthworm
species.pokedex_entry: This Pokémon lives in arid deserts. It maintains its metal body by consuming iron from the soil.

species.name: Oshawott
species.pokedex_entry: This Pokémon from the Unova region uses the shell on its belly as a weapon to cut down its foes. Thus, I've conferred upon this shell the name ”scalchop”.

species.name: Overqwil
species.pokedex_entry: Its lancelike spikes and savage temperament have earned it the nickname ”sea fiend.” It slurps up poison to nourish itself.

species.name: Pachirisu
species.pokedex_entry: A species related to the Pikachu line. Though Pachirisu is a calm Pokémon, it still presents a danger should one touch its electrified tail or cheeks.

species.name: Palafin
species.pokedex_entry: Its physical capabilities are no different than a Finizen’s, but when its allies are in danger, it transforms and powers itself up.

species.name: Palkia
species.pokedex_entry: It has the ability to distort space. It is described as a deity in Sinnoh-region mythology.

species.name: Palossand
species.pokedex_entry: Buried beneath the castle are masses of dried-up bones from those whose vitality it has drained.

species.name: Palpitoad
species.pokedex_entry: On occasion, their cries are sublimely pleasing to the ear. Palpitoad with larger lumps on their bodies can sing with a wider range of sounds.

species.name: Pancham
species.pokedex_entry: Wanting to make sure it’s taken seriously, Pancham’s always giving others a glare. But if it’s not focusing, it ends up smiling.

species.name: Pangoro
species.pokedex_entry: Using its leaf, Pangoro can predict the moves of its opponents. It strikes with punches that can turn a dump truck into scrap with just one hit.

species.name: Panpour
species.pokedex_entry: The water stored inside the tuft on its head is full of nutrients. Plants that receive its water grow large.

species.name: Pansage
species.pokedex_entry: It’s good at finding berries and gathers them from all over. It’s kind enough to share them with friends.

species.name: Pansear
species.pokedex_entry: This Pokémon lives in caves in volcanoes. The fire within the tuft on its head can reach 600 degrees Fahrenheit.

species.name: Paras
species.pokedex_entry: A Paras has parasitic tochukaso mushrooms growing on its back. They grow by drawing nutrients from the host. They are valued as a medicine for long life.

species.name: Parasect
species.pokedex_entry: Parasect are known to infest the roots of large trees en masse and drain nutrients. When an infested tree dies, they move onto another tree all at once.

species.name: Passimian
species.pokedex_entry: Passimian live in groups of about 20, with each member performing an assigned role. Through cooperation, the group survives.

species.name: Patrat
species.pokedex_entry: Extremely cautious, one of them will always be on the lookout, but it won’t notice a foe coming from behind.

species.name: Pawmi
species.pokedex_entry: The pads of its paws are electricity-discharging organs. Pawmi fires electricity from its forepaws while standing unsteadily on its hind legs.

species.name: Pawmo
species.pokedex_entry: Pawmo uses a unique fighting technique in which it uses its forepaws to strike foes and zap them with electricity from its paw pads simultaneously.

species.name: Pawmot
species.pokedex_entry: Pawmot’s fluffy fur acts as a battery. It can store the same amount of electricity as an electric car.

species.name: Pawniard
species.pokedex_entry: They fight at Bisharp's command. They cling to their prey and inflict damage by sinking their blades into it.

species.name: Pecharunt
species.pokedex_entry: Its peach-shaped shell serves as storage for a potent poison. It makes poisonous mochi and serves them to people and Pokémon.

species.name: Pelipper
species.pokedex_entry: Skimming the water’s surface, it dips its large bill in the sea, scoops up food and water, and carries it.

species.name: Perrserker
species.pokedex_entry: After many battles, it evolved dangerous claws that come together to form daggers when extended.

species.name: Persian
species.pokedex_entry: A Persian's six bold whiskers sense air movements to determine what is in its vicinity. It becomes docile if grabbed by the whiskers.

species.name: Petilil
species.pokedex_entry: The leaves on its head are highly valued for medicinal purposes. Dry the leaves in the sun, boil them, and then drink the bitter decoction for remarkably effective relief from fatigue.

species.name: Phanpy
species.pokedex_entry: Phanpy's big ears serve as broad fans. When it becomes hot, it flaps the ears busily to cool down. Even the young are very strong.

species.name: Phantump
species.pokedex_entry: These Pokémon are stumps possessed by the spirits of children who died in the forest. Their cries sound like eerie screams.

species.name: Pheromosa
species.pokedex_entry: Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives.

species.name: Phione
species.pokedex_entry: Can be seen floating offshore during seasons when the seas are warm. Its azure body blends in with the ocean waters—logic suggests this is a defense mechanism against natural predators.

species.name: Pichu
species.pokedex_entry: It is still inept at retaining electricity. When it is startled, it discharges power accidentally. It gets better at holding power as it grows older.

species.name: Pidgeot
species.pokedex_entry: This Pokémon has gorgeous, glossy feathers. Many trainers are so captivated by the beautiful feathers on its head that they choose Pidgeot as their Pokémon.

species.name: Pidgeotto
species.pokedex_entry: This Pokémon flies around, patrolling its large territory. If its living space is violated, it shows no mercy in thoroughly punishing the foe with its sharp claws.

species.name: Pidgey
species.pokedex_entry: It has an extremely sharp sense of direction. It can unerringly return home to its nest, however far it may be removed from its familiar surroundings.

species.name: Pidove
species.pokedex_entry: It’s forgetful and not very bright, but many Trainers love it anyway for its friendliness and sincerity.

species.name: Pignite
species.pokedex_entry: When its internal fire flares up, its movements grow sharper and faster. When in trouble, it emits smoke.

species.name: Pikachu
species.pokedex_entry: It stores electricity in the electric sacs on its cheeks. When it releases pent-up energy in a burst, the electric power is equal to a lightning bolt.

species.name: Pikipek
species.pokedex_entry: It may look spindly, but its neck muscles are heavy-duty. It can peck at a tree 16 times per second!

species.name: Piloswine
species.pokedex_entry: A Piloswine is covered by a thick coat of long hair for enduring freezing cold. It uses its tusks to dig up food that has been buried under ice.

species.name: Pincurchin
species.pokedex_entry: It stores electricity in each spine. Even if one gets broken off, it still continues to emit electricity for at least three hours.

species.name: Pineco
species.pokedex_entry: A Pineco hangs from a tree branch and waits for prey. While eating, if it is disturbed by someone shaking its tree, it falls on the ground and suddenly explodes.

species.name: Pinsir
species.pokedex_entry: Their pincers are strong enough to shatter thick logs. Because they dislike cold, Pinsir burrow and sleep under the ground on chilly nights.

species.name: Piplup
species.pokedex_entry: Because it is very proud, it hates accepting food from people. Its thick down guards it from cold.

species.name: Plusle
species.pokedex_entry: When Plusle is cheering on its partner, it flashes with electric sparks from all over its body. If its partner loses, this Pokémon cries loudly.

species.name: Poipole
species.pokedex_entry: An Ultra Beast that lives in a different world, it cackles wildly as it sprays its opponents with poison from the needles on its head.

species.name: Politoed
species.pokedex_entry: The curled hair on its head proves its status as a king. It is said that the longer and curlier the hair, the more respect it earns from its peers.

species.name: Poliwag
species.pokedex_entry: It is possible to see this Pokémon's spiral innards right through its thin skin. However, the skin is also very flexible. Even sharp fangs bounce right off it.

species.name: Poliwhirl
species.pokedex_entry: Its body surface is always wet and slick with an oily fluid. Because of this greasy covering, it can easily slip and slide out of the clutches of any enemy in battle.

species.name: Poliwrath
species.pokedex_entry: Its highly developed muscles never grow fatigued, however much it exercises. This Pokémon can swim back and forth across the Pacific Ocean without effort.

species.name: Poltchageist
species.pokedex_entry: Poltchageist looks like a regional form of Sinistea, but it was recently discovered that the two Pokémon are entirely unrelated.

species.name: Polteageist
species.pokedex_entry: Leaving leftover black tea unattended is asking for this Pokémon to come along and pour itself into it, turning the tea into a new Polteageist.

species.name: Ponyta
species.pokedex_entry: A Ponyta is very weak at birth. It can barely stand up. Its legs become stronger as it stumbles and falls while trying to keep up with its parent.

species.name: Poochyena
species.pokedex_entry: Poochyena is an omnivore—it will eat anything. A distinguishing feature is how large its fangs are compared to its body. This Pokémon tries to intimidate its foes by making the hair on its tail bristle out.

species.name: Popplio
species.pokedex_entry: If Popplio want to create big, powerful balloons, they must be persistent. It takes daily practice for these Pokémon to develop their skills.

species.name: Porygon
species.pokedex_entry: It is capable of reverting itself entirely back to program data in order to enter cyberspace. A Porygon is copy- protected so it cannot be duplicated.

species.name: Porygon-Z
species.pokedex_entry: Additional software was installed to make it a better Pokémon. It began acting oddly, however.

species.name: Porygon2
species.pokedex_entry: It was created by humans using the power of science. It has been given artificial intelligence that enables it to learn new gestures and emotions on its own.

species.name: Primarina
species.pokedex_entry: For Primarina, every battle’s a stage. Its singing and the dancing of its balloons will mesmerize the audience.

species.name: Primeape
species.pokedex_entry: When it becomes furious, its blood circulation becomes more robust, and its muscles are made stronger. But it also becomes much less intelligent.

species.name: Prinplup
species.pokedex_entry: It lives alone, away from others. Apparently, every one of them believes it is the most important.

species.name: Probopass
species.pokedex_entry: It exudes strong magnetism from all over. It controls three small units called Mini-Noses.

species.name: Psyduck
species.pokedex_entry: When its headache intensifies, it starts using strange powers. However, it has no recollection of its powers, so it always looks befuddled and bewildered.

species.name: Pumpkaboo
species.pokedex_entry: The pumpkin body is inhabited by a spirit trapped in this world. As the sun sets, it becomes restless and active.

species.name: Pupitar
species.pokedex_entry: A Pupitar creates a gas inside its body that it ejects under compression to propel itself like a jet. Its body can withstand a collision with solid steel.

species.name: Purrloin
species.pokedex_entry: Opponents that get drawn in by its adorable behavior come away with stinging scratches from its claws and stinging pride from its laughter.

species.name: Purugly
species.pokedex_entry: Though impudent and difficult to tame, Purugly enjoys great popularity due to its fur, the beauty of which surpasses even velveteen.

species.name: Pyroar
species.pokedex_entry: The temperature of its breath is over 10,000 degrees Fahrenheit, but Pyroar doesn’t use it on its prey. This Pokémon prefers to eat raw meat.

species.name: Pyukumuku
species.pokedex_entry: It can eject its internal organs, which it uses to engulf its prey or battle enemies.

species.name: Quagsire
species.pokedex_entry: A Quagsire hunts by leaving its mouth wide open in water and waiting for its prey to blunder in. Because it doesn't move, it does not get very hungry.

species.name: Quaquaval
species.pokedex_entry: Dancing in ways that evoke far-away places, this Pokémon mesmerizes all that see it. Flourishes of its decorative water feathers slice into its foes.

species.name: Quaxly
species.pokedex_entry: Its strong legs let it easily swim around in even fast-flowing rivers. It likes to keep things tidy and is prone to overthinking things.

species.name: Quaxwell
species.pokedex_entry: The hardworking Quaxwell observes people and Pokémon from various regions and incorporates their movements into its own dance routines.

species.name: Quilava
species.pokedex_entry: It intimidates foes with intense gusts of flames and superheated air. Its quick nimbleness lets it dodge attacks even while scorching an enemy.

species.name: Quilladin
species.pokedex_entry: They strengthen their lower bodies by running into one another. They are very kind and won't start fights.

species.name: Qwilfish
species.pokedex_entry: A Qwilfish uses the pressure of water it swallows to shoot toxic quills all at once from all over its body. It finds swimming to be somewhat challenging.

species.name: Raboot
species.pokedex_entry: It kicks berries right off the branches of trees and then juggles them with its feet, practicing its footwork.

species.name: Rabsca
species.pokedex_entry: An infant sleeps inside the ball. Rabsca rolls the ball soothingly with its legs to ensure the infant sleeps comfortably.

species.name: Raging Bolt
species.pokedex_entry: It bears resemblance to a Pokémon that became a hot topic for a short while after a paranormal magazine touted it as Raikou's ancestor.

species.name: Raichu
species.pokedex_entry: If it stores too much electricity, its behavior turns aggressive. To avoid this, it occasionally discharges excess energy and calms itself down.

species.name: Raikou
species.pokedex_entry: Raikou embodies the speed of lightning. Its roars send shock waves shuddering through the air and ground as if lightning bolts were crashing down.

species.name: Ralts
species.pokedex_entry: A Ralts has the power to sense the emotions of people and Pokémon with the horns on its head. It takes cover if it senses any hostility.

species.name: Rampardos
species.pokedex_entry: Its powerful head butt has enough power to shatter even the most durable things upon impact.

species.name: Rapidash
species.pokedex_entry: It usually canters casually in the fields and plains. But once a Rapidash turns serious, its fiery manes flare and blaze as it gallops its way up to 150 mph.

species.name: Raticate
species.pokedex_entry: A Raticate's sturdy fangs grow steadily. To keep them ground down, it gnaws on rocks and logs. It may even chew on the walls of houses.

species.name: Rattata
species.pokedex_entry: A Rattata is cautious in the extreme. Even while it is asleep, it constantly moves its ears and listens for danger. It will make its nest anywhere.

species.name: Rayquaza
species.pokedex_entry: A Pokémon that flies endlessly in the ozone layer. It is said it would descend to the ground if Kyogre and Groudon were to fight.

species.name: Regice
species.pokedex_entry: Its entire body is made of Antarctic ice. After extensive studies, researchers believe the ice was formed during an ice age.

species.name: Regidrago
species.pokedex_entry: Its body is composed of crystallized dragon energy. Regidrago is said to have the powers of every dragon Pokémon.

species.name: Regieleki
species.pokedex_entry: Its entire body is made up of a single organ that generates electrical energy. Regieleki is capable of creating all Galar’s electricity.

species.name: Regigigas
species.pokedex_entry: There is an enduring legend that states this Pokémon towed continents with ropes.

species.name: Regirock
species.pokedex_entry: A Pokémon that is made entirely of rocks and boulders. If parts of its body chip off in battle, Regirock repairs itself by adding new rocks.

species.name: Registeel
species.pokedex_entry: The body metal is composed of a mysterious substance. Not only is it hard, it shrinks and stretches flexibly.

species.name: Relicanth
species.pokedex_entry: This Pokémon was discovered during deep-sea exploration. Its appearance hasn’t changed in 100,000,000 years, so it’s called a living fossil.

species.name: Rellor
species.pokedex_entry: It rolls its mud ball around while the energy it needs for evolution matures. Eventually the time comes for it to evolve.

species.name: Remoraid
species.pokedex_entry: A Remoraid uses its abdominal muscles to forcefully expel swallowed water, then shoot down flying prey. When evolution approaches, it travels down rivers.

species.name: Reshiram
species.pokedex_entry: When Reshiram's tail flares, the heat energy moves the atmosphere and changes the world's weather.

species.name: Reuniclus
species.pokedex_entry: These remarkably intelligent Pokémon fight by controlling arms that can grip with rock-crushing power.

species.name: Revavroom
species.pokedex_entry: Revavroom viciously threatens others with the sound of its exhaust. It sticks its tongue out from its cylindrical mouth and sprays toxic fluids.

species.name: Rhydon
species.pokedex_entry: Its horn, which rotates like a drill, destroys tall buildings with one strike. It stands on its hind legs, and its brain is well developed.

species.name: Rhyhorn
species.pokedex_entry: Once it starts running, it doesn't stop. Its tiny brain makes it so stupid that it can't remember why it started running in the first place.

species.name: Rhyperior
species.pokedex_entry: It puts rocks in holes in its palms and uses its muscles to shoot them. Geodude are shot at rare times.

species.name: Ribombee
species.pokedex_entry: Ribombee absolutely hate getting wet or rained on. In the cloudy Galar region, they are very seldom seen.

species.name: Rillaboom
species.pokedex_entry: The one with the best drumming techniques becomes the boss of the troop. It has a gentle disposition and values harmony among its group.

species.name: Riolu
species.pokedex_entry: The aura that emanates from its body intensifies to alert others if it is afraid or sad.

species.name: Roaring Moon
species.pokedex_entry: According to an article in a dubious magazine, this Pokémon has some connection to a phenomenon that occurs in a certain region.

species.name: Rockruff
species.pokedex_entry: This Pokémon has lived with people since times long ago. It can sense when its Trainer is in the dumps and will stick close by its Trainer's side.

species.name: Roggenrola
species.pokedex_entry: When it detects a noise, it starts to move. The energy core inside it makes this Pokémon slightly warm to the touch.

species.name: Rolycoly
species.pokedex_entry: It can race around like a unicycle, even on rough, rocky terrain. Burning coal sustains it.

species.name: Rookidee
species.pokedex_entry: Jumping nimbly about, this small-bodied Pokémon takes advantage of even the slightest opportunity to disorient larger opponents.

species.name: Roselia
species.pokedex_entry: A Roselia that drinks nutritionally rich springwater blooms with lovely flowers. The fragrance of its flowers has the effect of making its foes careless.

species.name: Roserade
species.pokedex_entry: It attracts prey with a sweet aroma, then downs it with thorny whips hidden in its arms.

species.name: Rotom
species.pokedex_entry: Its body is composed of plasma. It is known to infiltrate electronic devices and wreak havoc.

species.name: Rowlet
species.pokedex_entry: Flies noiselessly on delicate wings. It has mastered the art of deftly launching dagger-sharp feathers from those same wings.

species.name: Rufflet
species.pokedex_entry: Its chick-like looks belie its hotheadedness. It challenges its parents at every opportunity, desperate to prove its strength.

species.name: Runerigus
species.pokedex_entry: Never touch its shadowlike body, or you’ll be shown the horrific memories behind the picture carved into it.

species.name: Sableye
species.pokedex_entry: It digs branching holes in caves using its sharp claws in search of food--raw gems. A Sableye lurks in darkness and is seen only rarely.

species.name: Salamence
species.pokedex_entry: After many long years, its cellular structure underwent a sudden mutation to grow wings. When angered, it loses all thought and rampages out of control.

species.name: Salandit
species.pokedex_entry: This sneaky Pokémon will slink behind its prey and immobilize it with poisonous gas before the prey even realizes Salandit is there.

species.name: Salazzle
species.pokedex_entry: The winner of competitions between Salazzle is decided by which one has the most male Salandit with it.

species.name: Samurott
species.pokedex_entry: Hard of heart and deft of blade, this rare form of Samurott is a product of the Pokémon's evolution in the region of Hisui. Its turbulent blows crash into foes like ceaseless pounding waves.

species.name: Sandaconda
species.pokedex_entry: Its unique style of coiling allows it to blast sand out of its sand sac more efficiently.

species.name: Sandile
species.pokedex_entry: It moves along below the sand's surface, except for its nose and eyes. A dark membrane shields its eyes from the sun.

species.name: Sandshrew
species.pokedex_entry: When it curls up in a ball, it can make any attack bounce off harmlessly. Its hide has turned tough and solid as a result of living in the desert.

species.name: Sandslash
species.pokedex_entry: It curls up in a ball to protect itself from enemy attacks. It also curls up to prevent heatstroke during the daytime when temperatures rise sharply.

species.name: Sandy Shocks
species.pokedex_entry: It slightly resembles a Magneton that lived for 10,000 years and was featured in an article in a paranormal magazine.

species.name: Sandygast
species.pokedex_entry: It likes the shovel on its head, so Sandygast will get serious and fight any children who come to take it back.

species.name: Sawk
species.pokedex_entry: The karate chops of a Sawk that’s trained itself to the limit can cleave the ocean itself.

species.name: Sawsbuck
species.pokedex_entry: They migrate according to the seasons, so some people call Sawsbuck the harbingers of spring.

species.name: Scatterbug
species.pokedex_entry: The powder that covers its body regulates its temperature, so it can live in any region or climate.

species.name: Sceptile
species.pokedex_entry: In the jungle, its power is without equal. This Pokémon carefully grows trees and plants. It regulates its body temperature by basking in sunlight.

species.name: Scizor
species.pokedex_entry: A Scizor has a body with the hardness of steel. It is not easily fazed by ordinary sorts of attacks. It flaps its wings to regulate its body temperature.

species.name: Scolipede
species.pokedex_entry: Highly aggressive, it uses the claws near its neck to dig into its opponents and poison them.

species.name: Scorbunny
species.pokedex_entry: It has special pads on the backs of its feet, and one on its nose. Once it’s raring to fight, these pads radiate tremendous heat.

species.name: Scovillain
species.pokedex_entry: The green head has turned vicious due to the spicy chemicals stimulating its brain. Once it goes on a rampage, there is no stopping it.

species.name: Scrafty
species.pokedex_entry: It can smash concrete blocks with its kicking attacks. The one with the biggest crest is the group leader.

species.name: Scraggy
species.pokedex_entry: It immediately headbutts anyone that makes eye contact with it. Its skull is massively thick.

species.name: Scream Tail
species.pokedex_entry: It resembles a mysterious Pokémon described in a paranormal magazine as a Jigglypuff from one billion years ago.

species.name: Scyther
species.pokedex_entry: Its blindingly fast speed adds to the sharpness of its twin forearm scythes. The scythes can slice through thick logs in one wicked stroke.

species.name: Seadra
species.pokedex_entry: The poisonous barbs all over its body are highly valued as ingredients for making traditional herbal medicine. It shows no mercy to anything approaching its nest.

species.name: Seaking
species.pokedex_entry: It punches holes in boulders on stream- beds. This is a clever innovation that prevents its eggs from being attacked or washed away by the current.

species.name: Sealeo
species.pokedex_entry: Its white whiskers are very sensitive. Sealeo will balance Spheal on the tip of its nose, checking its scent and its feel to be sure the Spheal is healthy.

species.name: Seedot
species.pokedex_entry: It attaches itself to a tree branch using the top of its head. Strong winds can sometimes make it fall.

species.name: Seel
species.pokedex_entry: Seel hunt for prey in frigid, ice-covered seas. When it needs to breathe, it punches a hole through the ice with the sharply protruding section of its head.

species.name: Seismitoad
species.pokedex_entry: This Pokémon is popular among the elderly, who say the vibrations of its lumps are great for massages.

species.name: Sentret
species.pokedex_entry: They take turns standing guard when it is time to sleep. The sentry awakens the others if it senses danger. If one becomes separated, it turns sleepless with fear.

species.name: Serperior
species.pokedex_entry: It can stop its opponents’ movements with just a glare. It takes in solar energy and boosts it internally.

species.name: Servine
species.pokedex_entry: When it gets dirty, its leaves can’t be used in photosynthesis, so it always keeps itself clean.

species.name: Seviper
species.pokedex_entry: Seviper’s swordlike tail serves two purposes—it slashes foes and douses them with secreted poison. This Pokémon will not give up its long-running blood feud with Zangoose.

species.name: Sewaddle
species.pokedex_entry: Since this Pokémon makes its own clothes out of leaves, it is a popular mascot for fashion designers.

species.name: Sharpedo
species.pokedex_entry: The vicious and sly gangster of the sea. Its skin is specially textured to minimize drag in water. Its speed tops out at over 75 miles per hour.

species.name: Shaymin
species.pokedex_entry: When the turning of seasons brings the cruel winter to its end and the joyous people give thanks to the heavens, Shaymin appears and covers the withered land with flowers.

species.name: Shedinja
species.pokedex_entry: A peculiar Pokémon that floats in air even though its wings remain completely still. The inside of its body is hollow and utterly dark.

species.name: Shelgon
species.pokedex_entry: It hardly eats while it awaits evolution. It becomes hardier by enduring hunger. Its shell peels off the instant it begins to evolve.

species.name: Shellder
species.pokedex_entry: At night, it burrows a hole in the seafloor with its broad tongue to make a place to sleep. While asleep, it closes its shell, but leaves its tongue hanging out.

species.name: Shellos
species.pokedex_entry: Found in abundance on seashores bordering warm waters. Shellos are unexpectedly friendly and will crawl toward any person they see. Take care not to get coated in mucus!

species.name: Shelmet
species.pokedex_entry: It has a strange physiology that responds to electricity. When together with Karrablast, Shelmet evolves for some reason.

species.name: Shieldon
species.pokedex_entry: A Pokémon that lived in jungles around 100 million years ago. Its facial hide is extremely hard.

species.name: Shiftry
species.pokedex_entry: It lives quietly in the deep forest. It is said to create chilly winter winds with the fans it holds.

species.name: Shiinotic
species.pokedex_entry: If you see a light deep in a forest at night, don’t go near. Shiinotic will make you fall fast asleep.

species.name: Shinx
species.pokedex_entry: All of its fur dazzles if danger is sensed. It flees while the foe is momentarily blinded.

species.name: Shroodle
species.pokedex_entry: To keep enemies away from its territory, it paints markings around its nest using a poisonous liquid that has an acrid odor.

species.name: Shroomish
species.pokedex_entry: It loves to eat damp, composted soil in forests. If you enter a forest after a long rain, you can see many Shroomish feasting on composted soil.

species.name: Shuckle
species.pokedex_entry: A Shuckle hides under rocks, keeping its body concealed inside its shell while eating stored berries. The berries mix with its body fluids to become a juice.

species.name: Shuppet
species.pokedex_entry: This Pokémon roams about deep in the night seeking such negative emotions as grudges and envy. It retreats to its nest when the sun begins to rise.

species.name: Sigilyph
species.pokedex_entry: A discovery was made in the desert where Sigilyph fly. The ruins of what may have been an ancient city were found beneath the sands.

species.name: Silcoon
species.pokedex_entry: Wraps itself in thin strings of silk while it stores energy for evolution. It can't extend its limbs and its movement is slow, but its eyes keep a sharp lookout—Silcoon is always on guard.

species.name: Silicobra
species.pokedex_entry: It spews sand from its nostrils. While the enemy is blinded, it burrows into the ground to hide.

species.name: Silvally
species.pokedex_entry: The final factor needed to release this Pokémon’s true power was a strong bond with a Trainer it trusts.

species.name: Simipour
species.pokedex_entry: It prefers places with clean water. When its tuft runs low, it replenishes it by siphoning up water with its tail.

species.name: Simisage
species.pokedex_entry: Ill tempered, it fights by swinging its barbed tail around wildly. The leaf growing on its head is very bitter.

species.name: Simisear
species.pokedex_entry: When it gets excited, embers rise from its head and tail and it gets hot. For some reason, it loves sweets.

species.name: Sinistcha
species.pokedex_entry: It prefers cool, dark places, such as the back of a shelf or the space beneath a home's floorboards. It wanders in search of prey after sunset.

species.name: Sinistea
species.pokedex_entry: The teacup in which this Pokémon makes its home is a famous piece of antique tableware. Many forgeries are in circulation.

species.name: Sirfetch’d
species.pokedex_entry: After deflecting attacks with its hard leaf shield, it strikes back with its sharp leek stalk. The leek stalk is both weapon and food.

species.name: Sizzlipede
species.pokedex_entry: It wraps prey up with its heated body, cooking them in its coils. Once they’re well-done, it will voraciously nibble them down to the last morsel.

species.name: Skarmory
species.pokedex_entry: A Pokémon that has a body and wings of steel. People in the past used feathers fallen from Skarmory to make swords and knives.

species.name: Skeledirge
species.pokedex_entry: Skeledirge’s gentle singing soothes the souls of all that hear it. It burns its enemies to a crisp with flames of over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit.

species.name: Skiddo
species.pokedex_entry: If it has sunshine and water, it doesn’t need to eat, because it can generate energy from the leaves on its back.

species.name: Skiploom
species.pokedex_entry: It blossoms when the temperature rises above 64 degrees F. Because its flower's blooming changes with the temperature, it is sometimes used as a thermometer.

species.name: Skitty
species.pokedex_entry: Skitty is known to chase around playfully after its own tail. In the wild, this Pokémon lives in holes in the trees of forests. It is very popular as a pet because of its adorable looks.

species.name: Skorupi
species.pokedex_entry: Its claws are not only razor-sharp but poisonous, making Skorupi a highly dangerous Pokémon. It seems to be weakened by cold temperatures, however.

species.name: Skrelp
species.pokedex_entry: Skrelp looks like a piece of rotten seaweed, so it can blend in with seaweed drifting on the ocean and avoid being detected by enemies.

species.name: Skuntank
species.pokedex_entry: Sprays a poisonous fluid to take down prey. Sometimes, unable to stomach the stench of its own fluid, it leaves the bested prey uneaten.

species.name: Skwovet
species.pokedex_entry: It eats berries nonstop—a habit that has made it more resilient than it looks. It’ll show up on farms, searching for yet more berries.

species.name: Slaking
species.pokedex_entry: Hordes of Slaking gather around trees when fruits come into season. They wait around patiently for ripened fruits to fall out of the trees.

species.name: Slakoth
species.pokedex_entry: It sleeps virtually all day and night long. It doesn't change its nest its entire life, but it sometimes travels great distances by swimming in rivers.

species.name: Sliggoo
species.pokedex_entry: This Pokémon's mucous can dissolve anything. Toothless, it sprays mucous on its prey. Once they're nicely dissolved, it slurps them up.

species.name: Slither Wing
species.pokedex_entry: This Pokémon somewhat resembles an ancient form of Volcarona that was introduced in a dubious magazine.

species.name: Slowbro
species.pokedex_entry: Its tail has a Shellder firmly attached with a bite. As a result, the tail can't be used for fishing anymore. This forces it to reluctantly swim and catch prey.

species.name: Slowking
species.pokedex_entry: It undertakes research every day to solve the mysteries of the world. However, it apparently forgets everything if the Shellder on its head comes off.

species.name: Slowpoke
species.pokedex_entry: It catches prey by dipping its tail in water at the side of a river. But it often forgets what it is doing and spends entire days just loafing at water's edge.

species.name: Slugma
species.pokedex_entry: It is a species of Pokémon that lives in volcanic areas. If its body cools, its skin hardens and immobilizes it. To avoid that, it sleeps near magma.

species.name: Slurpuff
species.pokedex_entry: It can distinguish the faintest of scents. It puts its sensitive sense of smell to use by helping pastry chefs in their work.

species.name: Smeargle
species.pokedex_entry: A Smeargle marks its territory using a fluid that leaks out from the tip of its tail. About 5,000 different marks left by this Pokémon have been found.

species.name: Smoliv
species.pokedex_entry: This Pokémon converts nutrients into oil, which it stores in the fruit on its head. It can easily go a whole week without eating or drinking.

species.name: Smoochum
species.pokedex_entry: It actively runs about, but also falls often. Whenever it falls, it will check its reflection on a lake's surface to make sure its face hasn't become dirty.

species.name: Sneasel
species.pokedex_entry: A Sneasel scales trees by punching its hooked claws into the bark. It seeks out unguarded nests and steals eggs for food while the parents are away.

species.name: Sneasler
species.pokedex_entry: Because of Sneasler's virulent poison and daunting physical prowess, no other species could hope to best it on the frozen highlands. Preferring solitude, this species does not form packs.

species.name: Snivy
species.pokedex_entry: They photosynthesize by bathing their tails in sunlight. When they are not feeling well, their tails droop.

species.name: Snom
species.pokedex_entry: It eats snow that piles up on the ground. The more snow it eats, the bigger and more impressive the spikes on its back grow.

species.name: Snorlax
species.pokedex_entry: Snorlax's typical day consists of nothing more than eating and sleeping. It is such a docile Pokémon that there are children who use its big belly as a place to play.

species.name: Snorunt
species.pokedex_entry: They tend to move about in groups of around five Snorunt. In snowy regions, it is said that when they are seen late at night, snowfall will arrive by morning.

species.name: Snover
species.pokedex_entry: One is likely to encounter this Pokémon while out in the snow. There are stories of Snover appearing in human settlements but doing no harm—rather, they bond with the children.

species.name: Snubbull
species.pokedex_entry: By baring its fangs and making a scary face, it sends smaller Pokémon scurrying in terror. The Snubbull does seem a little sad at making its foes flee.

species.name: Sobble
species.pokedex_entry: When it gets wet, its skin changes color, and this Pokémon becomes invisible as if it were camouflaged.

species.name: Solgaleo
species.pokedex_entry: Solgaleo was once known as the Beast That Devours the Sun. Energy in the form of light radiates boundlessly from it.

species.name: Solosis
species.pokedex_entry: Because their bodies are enveloped in a special liquid, they can survive in any environment.

species.name: Solrock
species.pokedex_entry: Solar energy is the source of its power, so it is strong during the daytime. When it spins, its body shines.

species.name: Spearow
species.pokedex_entry: Its loud cry can be heard over half a mile away. If its high, keening cry is heard echoing all around, it is a sign that they are warning each other of danger.

species.name: Spectrier
species.pokedex_entry: As it dashes through the night, Spectrier absorbs the life-force of sleeping creatures. It craves silence and solitude.

species.name: Spewpa
species.pokedex_entry: The beaks of bird Pokémon can’t begin to scratch its stalwart body. To defend itself, it spews powder.

species.name: Spheal
species.pokedex_entry: During the season when drift ice approaches the shore, Spheal prefers living on the ice—where fewer predators lurk—rather than the land. Its fur retains heat superbly and resists harsh cold.

species.name: Spidops
species.pokedex_entry: Spidops covers its territory in tough, sticky threads to set up traps for intruders.

species.name: Spinarak
species.pokedex_entry: The web it spins can be considered its second nervous system. It is said that a Spinarak determines its prey by the tiny vibrations it feels through the web.

species.name: Spinda
species.pokedex_entry: Each Spinda’s spot pattern is different. With its stumbling movements, it evades opponents’ attacks brilliantly!

species.name: Spiritomb
species.pokedex_entry: A Pokémon that was formed by 108 spirits. It is bound to a fissure in an odd keystone.

species.name: Spoink
species.pokedex_entry: Spoink keeps a pearl on top of its head. The pearl functions to amplify this Pokémon’s psychokinetic powers. It is therefore on a constant search for a bigger pearl.

species.name: Sprigatito
species.pokedex_entry: The sweet scent its body gives off mesmerizes those around it. The scent grows stronger when this Pokémon is in the sun.

species.name: Spritzee
species.pokedex_entry: The scent its body gives off enraptures those who smell it. Noble ladies had no shortage of love for Spritzee.

species.name: Squawkabilly
species.pokedex_entry: Green-feathered flocks hold the most sway. When they’re out searching for food in the mornings and evenings, it gets very noisy.

species.name: Squirtle
species.pokedex_entry: Its shell is not just for protection. Its rounded shape and the grooves on its surface minimize resistance in water, enabling Squirtle to swim at high speeds.

species.name: Stakataka
species.pokedex_entry: When stone walls started moving and attacking, the brute’s true identity was this mysterious life-form, which brings to mind an Ultra Beast.

species.name: Stantler
species.pokedex_entry: Stantler's magnificent antlers were once traded at high prices as works of art. As a result, this Pokémon was hunted close to extinction.

species.name: Staraptor
species.pokedex_entry: It has left the flock, having gained strength enough to survive on its own. The astounding force with which Staraptor flies through the air allows it to carry away large, burly targets.

species.name: Staravia
species.pokedex_entry: They form remarkably large flocks and are constantly fighting amongst themselves. I suspect that those with magnificent plumes on their heads are the strong ones.

species.name: Starly
species.pokedex_entry: They live in the fields and mountains, gathering in large flocks. Their cries are quite obnoxious. Though small, their wings are strong—a strike from them leaves pain that persists for a week.

species.name: Starmie
species.pokedex_entry: People in ancient times imagined that Starmie were transformed from the reflections of stars that twinkled on gentle waves at night.

species.name: Staryu
species.pokedex_entry: It gathers with others in the night and makes its red core glow on and off with the twinkling stars. It can regenerate limbs if they are severed from its body.

species.name: Steelix
species.pokedex_entry: Steelix live even further underground than Onix. This Pokémon is known to dig toward the earth's core, reaching a depth of over six-tenths of a mile underground.

species.name: Steenee
species.pokedex_entry: Any Corvisquire that pecks at this Pokémon will be greeted with a smack from its sepals followed by a sharp kick.

species.name: Stonjourner
species.pokedex_entry: Once a year, on a specific date and at a specific time, they gather out of nowhere and form up in a circle.

species.name: Stoutland
species.pokedex_entry: Stoutland is immensely proud of its impressive moustache. It’s said that moustache length is what determines social standing among this species.

species.name: Stufful
species.pokedex_entry: Despite its adorable appearance, when it gets angry and flails about, its arms and legs could knock a pro wrestler sprawling.

species.name: Stunfisk
species.pokedex_entry: It conceals itself in the mud of the seashore. Then it waits. When prey touch it, it delivers a jolt of energy.

species.name: Stunky
species.pokedex_entry: The poison that gushes from its aft end is accompanied by an utterly evil-smelling odor with such potency that one whiff can induce memory loss.

species.name: Sudowoodo
species.pokedex_entry: It mimics a tree to avoid being attacked by enemies. But since its forelegs remain green throughout the year, it is easily identified as a fake in the winter.

species.name: Suicune
species.pokedex_entry: Suicune embodies the compassion of a pure spring of water. It runs across the land with gliding elegance. It has the power to purify dirty water.

species.name: Sunflora
species.pokedex_entry: Sunflora convert solar energy into nutrition. They are highly active in the warm daytime but suddenly stop moving as soon as the sun sets.

species.name: Sunkern
species.pokedex_entry: Sunkern try to minimize movement to conserve the nutrients they have stored in their bodies for evolution. They will not eat, subsisting only on morning dew.

species.name: Surskit
species.pokedex_entry: It lives in ponds and marshes that feature lots of plant life. It often fights with Dewpider, whose habitat and diet are similar.

species.name: Swablu
species.pokedex_entry: A Pokémon that has wings like cottony clouds. After enduring winter, in which little food is available, Swablu flocks move closer to towns in the spring.

species.name: Swadloon
species.pokedex_entry: It protects itself from the cold by wrapping up in leaves. It stays on the move, eating leaves in forests.

species.name: Swalot
species.pokedex_entry: Swalot has no teeth, so what it eats, it swallows whole, no matter what. Its cavernous mouth yawns widely. An automobile tire could easily fit inside this Pokémon’s mouth.

species.name: Swampert
species.pokedex_entry: If it senses the approach of a storm and a tidal wave, it protects its seaside nest by piling up boulders. It swims as fast as a jet ski.

species.name: Swanna
species.pokedex_entry: Swanna start to dance at dusk. The one dancing in the middle is the leader of the flock.

species.name: Swellow
species.pokedex_entry: Swellow is very conscientious about the upkeep of its glossy wings. Once two Swellow are gathered, they diligently take care of cleaning each other’s wings.

species.name: Swinub
species.pokedex_entry: It roots for food by rubbing its snout against the ground. Its favorite food is a mushroom that grows under dried grass. It occasionally roots out hot springs.

species.name: Swirlix
species.pokedex_entry: To entangle its opponents in battle, it extrudes white threads as sweet and sticky as cotton candy.

species.name: Swoobat
species.pokedex_entry: The auspicious shape of this Pokémon’s nose apparently led some regions to consider Swoobat a symbol of good luck.

species.name: Sylveon
species.pokedex_entry: It sends a soothing aura from its ribbonlike feelers to calm fights.

species.name: Tadbulb
species.pokedex_entry: It floats using the electricity stored in its body. When thunderclouds are around, Tadbulb will float higher off the ground.

species.name: Taillow
species.pokedex_entry: Taillow is young—it has only just left its nest. As a result, it sometimes becomes lonesome and cries at night. This Pokémon feeds on Wurmple that live in forests.

species.name: Talonflame
species.pokedex_entry: In the fever of an exciting battle, it showers embers from the gaps between its feathers and takes to the air.

species.name: Tandemaus
species.pokedex_entry: The pair sticks together no matter what. They split any food they find exactly in half and then eat it together.

species.name: Tangela
species.pokedex_entry: Its vines snap off easily and painlessly if they are grabbed, allowing it to make a quick getaway. The lost vines are replaced by new growth the very next day.

species.name: Tangrowth
species.pokedex_entry: It ensnares prey by extending arms made of vines. Losing arms to predators does not trouble it.

species.name: Tapu Bulu
species.pokedex_entry: It makes ringing sounds with its tail to let others know where it is, avoiding unneeded conflicts. This guardian deity of Ula’ula controls plants.

species.name: Tapu Fini
species.pokedex_entry: Although it’s called a guardian deity, terrible calamities sometimes befall those who recklessly approach Tapu Fini.

species.name: Tapu Koko
